nasb.text: Therefore you should now clearly understand that you will die by the sword, by famine and by pestilence, in the place where you wish to go to reside.

esv.text: Now therefore know for a certainty that you shall die by the sword, by famine, and by pestilence in the place where you desire to go to live.”

cnv.text: 現在你們要確實知道，在你們想去寄居的那地方，你們必因刀劍、饑荒和瘟疫而死。”

ccb.text: 因此，你们要清楚知道，你们如果决意去埃及住，必死于战争、饥荒和瘟疫。”
